# Manuel Warum

> Senior Software Engineer, Product Owner, Research Engineer, and Generative AI Champion.

I build products at the intersection of AI, DevOps, and platform engineering.
At Dynatrace, I lead product execution for AI-powered integrations that connect
observability data with the tools engineering teams use every day.

## What I Build

At Dynatrace, I drive product and roadmap execution for a portfolio of
platform integrations and AI-driven tooling, including:

- Bluebox: Dynatrace's latest offering in the AI space.
- Local MCP Server: Local Model Context Protocol workflows for Dynatrace
	observability data.
- Site Reliability Guardian: Automated reliability validation to catch
	regressions early.
- CI/CD Connectors: Jenkins, GitLab, and Backstage integrations.
- Event-Driven Automation: Red Hat Event-Driven Ansible connector for
	observability-driven remediation.
- ServiceNow and PagerDuty Connectors: Bridging incident management and
	observability loops.

I have been working with generative AI and LLM-driven workflows for more than five years.
I enjoy exploring efficient solutions with reliability, cost, and repeatability in mind.

## What I Teach

Due to my unique positioning, I have had an early start to working with generative AI.
I have seen the technology take its first baby steps, and held its hands on the journey to maturity.
I use that knowledge to help my colleagues managing day-to-day operations more efficiently,
infusing my expertise in design of agentic systems.

I also have a decent background in agile processes and forecasting methods.
I use it to drive reliable predictions of delivery times using Monte Carlo,
ensuring that our customers are met with success on time.

## Expertise

- AI Product Leadership and Strategy
- Generative AI and Large Language Models
- AI Agent development and interfacing
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- DevOps and Platform Engineering
- Site Reliability Engineering
- CI/CD Pipeline Integrations
- Agile Product Ownership
- Observability and Monitoring
- Event-Driven Automation
- 3D Printing and CAD
- Cartography and Geographic Information Systems

## Extras

- Extracurricular projects, including contributions around Lange Nacht der
	Forschung 2026.
- Volunteer work supporting people in need.
